hero.subtitle: A national project placing citizens at the heart of development, aimed at strengthening national sovereignty, advancing the digital economy, and empowering youth in decision-making.

cards.title: Economic Dignity
cards.description: Improving citizens' purchasing power and supporting national production to reduce dependency on imports.

cards.title: Local Development
cards.description: Fair distribution of wealth among wilayas and empowering municipal councils with financial autonomy.

cards.title: Youth & Education
cards.description: Modernizing curricula, supporting startups, and aligning education with the modern job market.

cards.title: Accountability & Transparency
cards.description: Strengthening institutional oversight and guaranteeing citizens' right to access information and public data.

timeline.title: A Journey of Dedication and Fieldwork
timeline.intro: Kehal Amina is an architect and political figure from El Milia, Jijel. She has dedicated her career to local development — from urban planning and construction management to legislative and social work at the Provincial People's Assembly. She believes that real change begins on the ground, close to the citizen.
timeline.imageCaption: Fieldwork is the foundation of change

items.label: Academic Achievement
items.description: Earned an Architecture Engineering degree from the University of Jijel, launching a distinguished career in local development and public service.

items.label: Municipal Service
items.description: Joined the APC of El Milia as an architect, rising to Head of Urban Planning and then Director of Urbanism, Construction and Works until 2021.

items.label: Provincial Assembly
items.description: Elected as a member of the People's Provincial Assembly (APW) of Jijel under the FLN party list for the 2017–2021 term.

items.label: Commission Presidency
items.description: Re-elected and appointed President of the Social, Cultural, Religious, Sports and Youth Affairs Commission at the APW of Jijel.

items.title: Directing Urban Development
items.description: Served as Director of Urbanism, Construction and Works at El Milia municipality, overseeing infrastructure projects to improve citizens' living conditions.

items.title: Supporting Families in Need
items.description: Led social support programs for underprivileged families across Jijel through the APW Social Affairs Commission.

items.title: Youth & Sports Empowerment
items.description: Supported youth projects and organized sports and cultural events in coordination with wilaya directorates through the commission.

items.title: Women in Political Life
items.description: Championed women's participation in local and political life, through her responsibilities in the FLN party and her elected role at the APW.

footer.name: Kehal Amina
footer.description: Architect and elected member of the APW of Jijel. For a strong, prosperous, and just Algeria for all its children.
